title: Renal findings in a nephrology note
description: Extract only explicitly documented renal facts. reason_for_consult must match the stated primary consult reason; if the note says consulted for AKI, choose aki. aki is active only for current confirmed AKI, historical_or_resolved only for prior/resolved AKI, suspected only when the clinician explicitly says possible/suspected/risk, and absent when AKI is not documented. Do not infer AKI or an AKI stage from creatinine or eGFR. aki_stage 1/2/3 requires an explicit KDIGO/AKIN stage; otherwise use not_documented. CKD stages require explicit documentation; ESRD is CKD stage 5; CKD named without a stage is documented_stage_unknown. Dialysis and transplant states must follow explicit wording, including failed transplant as failing and prior nonfunctioning transplant as historical. A single current creatinine is not a baseline creatinine; use null unless a baseline/prior value is explicitly labeled. Evidence must be a short exact quote. Never fabricate diagnoses, measurements, or recommendations.

reason_for_consult.description: The explicitly stated primary reason nephrology was consulted.

aki.description: Explicit AKI status; never infer it from renal labs or ESRD.

aki_stage.description: Only an explicitly stated KDIGO/AKIN AKI stage; otherwise not_documented.

ckd_stage.description: Explicit CKD stage; ESRD is 5 and CKD without a stage is documented_stage_unknown.

renal_transplant.description: Explicit transplant status; a failed transplant is failing or historical, not none.

baseline_creatinine.description: Explicitly labeled baseline/prior creatinine in mg/dL, or null; do not copy the current value.

current_creatinine.description: mg/dL, or null when not stated

egfr.description: mL/min/1.73m2, or null when not stated

evidence.description: Short verbatim quote supporting the primary renal finding
